---
title: "Cascadia Clothing"
subtitle: "Coming soon — retail and ecommerce analytics for an apparel scenario."
---

::: {.case-study-header}
::: {.cs-domain}
Retail Analytics
:::
# Cascadia Clothing
::: {.cs-hook}
The next Cascadia build — retail and ecommerce analytics, with the stack matched to the problem once the data is chosen.
:::
:::

---

The next Cascadia build: retail and ecommerce analytics for an apparel scenario — demand and inventory, merchandising performance, and fulfillment/OTIF. Drawing on my ecommerce BI background, it will extend the Cascadia approach into retail, with the tooling chosen to fit the data and scale. Check back, or follow along on [GitHub](https://github.com/RobbinsAnalytics).
